_comment: RespireLYF app mockups used as reference images for NanoBanana IMAGETOIAMGE mode. Each mockup is uploaded to Payload Media on first run; URLs are cached in .app-mockups-cache.json. Keywords drive topic-based auto-selection for CTA images.

today.description: RespireLYF Today tab — the main daily logging screen showing Health Indicators (Vitals, Cough Tracker, Breathing Score, Peak Flow, Asthma Check-In) and Health Determinants in a clean card grid. Features the MD-RIC AI avatar and Apple Watch status in the header.

cough.description: RespireLYF Cough Tracker screen — a clean iPhone screen with a large circular blue microphone button, real-time cough count, and elapsed tracking time. Showcases the passive on-device cough detection feature.

ecosystem.description: RespireLYF product hero shot — iPhone showing the Today tab with cough tracking callouts, alongside an Apple Watch displaying active cough tracking session. The full iPhone + Apple Watch ecosystem view.
